matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: rs7715147 (ELOVL7 intronic MSA locus marker) (ELOVL7 MSA GWAS-interest intronic marker)
ELOVL7 expression or knockdown lipid-elongation model (ELOVL7 VLCFA remodeling functional model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an ELOVL7 ER fatty-acid elongase and VLCFA-remodeling thesis: the individual may carry a research-grade signal relevant to saturated or polyunsaturated very-long-chain fatty-acid metabolism, prostate-cancer lipid biosynthesis, HCMV lipidome remodeling, necroptotic membrane biology, liver-fibrosis expression context, or MSA locus research. This is lipid-metabolism and locus context, not a diagnostic cancer, infection, fibrosis, neurodegenerative-disease, or inherited-disorder prediction.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: Observed ELOVL7 rs7715147 suggests an MSA GWAS-interest lipid-dyshomeostasis locus thesis: the sample matched an intronic marker retained for neurogenetic research context around ELOVL7 and very-long-chain fatty-acid biology. Keep this locus-level and non-diagnostic because follow-up sequencing and copy-number work did not support rare ELOVL7 coding variants or CNV as a major MSA risk driver.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched rs7715147 (ELOVL7 intronic MSA locus marker) at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the ELOVL7 prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Intronic locus marker; no direct coding effect is bundled.

evidence.label: PMCID PMC7983070: ELOVL7 coding variants in MSA follow-up study
NCBI Gene 79993: ELOVL7 locus and variation resources

variant_prediction_rules.display_name: ELOVL7 expression or knockdown lipid-elongation model
variant_prediction_rules.prediction: Observed ELOVL7 functional or expression context suggests a VLCFA-remodeling thesis: the sample matched a model class tied to ER fatty-acid elongation, prostate-cancer lipid biosynthesis, HCMV lipidome remodeling, necroptotic membrane disruption, or liver-fibrosis expression studies. Treat this as pathway and regulatory biology rather than a specific inherited variant or stand-alone disease prediction.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched ELOVL7 expression or knockdown lipid-elongation model at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the ELOVL7 prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Purified ELOVL7 shows high activity toward C18 acyl-CoA substrates in VLCFA elongation assays.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an ELOVL7 ER fatty-acid elongase and VLCFA-remodeling thesis: the individual may carry a research-grade signal relevant to saturated or polyunsaturated very-long-chain fatty-acid metabolism, prostate-cancer lipid biosynthesis, HCMV lipidome remodeling, necroptotic membrane biology, liver-fibrosis expression context, or MSA locus research. This is lipid-metabolism and locus context, not a diagnostic cancer, infection, fibrosis, neurodegenerative-disease, or inherited-disorder prediction. An observed ELOVL7 variant places this sample in the curated ELOVL7 research context. The local ELOVL7 knowledge base is lipid-metabolism, prostate-cancer, viral lipid-remodeling, liver-fibrosis, necroptosis, and neurogenetics research oriented. ELOVL7 is not bundled here as a deterministic diagnostic gene; even in multiple-system-atrophy follow-up sequencing, rare coding variants and copy-number changes did not significantly explain disease risk. Biochemical and structural literature supports ELOVL7 as a membrane-bound fatty-acid elongase that preferentially processes C18 acyl-CoA substrates and participates in VLCFA elongation.
cases.rationale: This is the base thesis that activates as soon as any promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample.
